title: Mirror column automations
excerpt:
Dear Monday, please allow the use of this automation 
When “mirror status” changes from “anything” to “something”, move item to “group” 
Thank-you

posts.author: abishjones (Abish)
posts.cookedHtml:
Dear Monday, please allow the use of this automation

When “mirror status” changes from “anything” to “something”, move item to “group”

Thank-you

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes! unfortunately for now you have to use one that changes a status, and then use that to trigger changing group.

posts.author: Katelynn (Katelynn Zuiderveen)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like the ability to create automations for “mirror status” columns. Has anyone submitted a feature request?

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
You actually can use the “status change” automations in a limited way:

image1036×396 35.2 KB

Here are the supported recipes for automations that can be triggered by mirrors changing.

Support

Which automation recipes support mirrored columns as a trigger?

3 min read Feature   Are you working with a mirrored Status Column and would like to use it as an automation trigger on your board? If so, here's what you need to know!     Automation recip...

posts.author: Katelynn (Katelynn Zuiderveen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you Cody for your message. I am looking to create an automation that Abish mentioned:
When mirrored status column changes to [insert status name], move item to group B

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
This isn’t possible, as it is not in the list that can trigger from mirrors.

I do have a workaround you can try: “When status changes to something, change another status to something” automation to change a status on the board when a mirror changes - then when that status changes, move item to group b.

posts.author: Katelynn (Katelynn Zuiderveen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you. Another automation I would like to create:
Boards A, B & C are connected.
On board B, when a mirrored column S changes status to X, create a new item in board C and connect mirrored column S with all 3 boards.

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: That will need a separate feature request I suspect - and note, I am a monday.com partner, not monday.com team member. Partners are consultants and app developers - we don’t work for monday.
